channel.title: Death on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Death on RaihnForge

item.title: Keyes Beholding – SotN Grim Reaper
item.description:
Speed Painting: Keyes Beholding–SotN Grim Reaper

As a fun exercise I decided to find a screen shot of one of the greatest 2d side scrolling games ever made, Castlevania SotN.  Eventually I’d like to create an entire HD remix of the screen shot as a fun wallpaper background.  For now, I’m going to try and go through piece by piece as a study.

item.title: Cyber Reaper
item.description:
A fun digital sketch exercise ran away from me as my mind raced as I envisioned the nerd reaper.  The gathering of digital souls is a large job, since Mario gamers have been plunging to there Deaths an uncountable number of times.

     Here stalks the key master and gate keeper of Death, frag fester, nub nuker, rage writher, respawn reaver, the Cyber Reaper.

Joshua.Keyes@gmail.com
